title: The Java Thread Lifecycle and State Transitions
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of a Java thread, showing its various states and the methods or events that cause transitions between them.
relationships: Thread.start() transitions from New to Runnable
Thread acquires lock transitions from Runnable to Blocked
Object.wait() transitions from Runnable to Waiting
Thread.sleep() or Object.wait(timeout) transitions from Runnable to Timed Waiting
Notification or timeout transitions from Waiting/Timed Waiting back to Runnable
Run method completes transitions from Runnable to Terminated
